description: Phase 2.1 FR acceptance-criteria enrichment (Pass 2 of 3): expand one FR skeleton into a complete measurable acceptance_criteria[] list.

template_variables.active_constraints:
1. 100% correctness and completeness — always. All three layers of correctness (Section 1.6) are required. (Authority 7, source: 4394e1a8-f6d1-42c0-a25c-7991e6d02a5e)
2. Every phase is mandatory and executed in order. The Orchestrator cannot skip phases. (Authority 7, source: 0450a160-f9ec-4e41-ab94-188f37bf1794)
3. All Artifacts are owned by JanumiCode and stored in the Governed Stream database. (Authority 7, source: a1030128-7334-4d7a-8ae9-8900de3c2993)
4. Prompt Templates use namespace prefixing ([JC:] and [P:]) and separate context scopes at all times. (Authority 7, source: a67d4502-972e-4c08-b482-19fbc402a5e9)
5. The Governed Stream is lossless. All execution trace content — reasoning steps, self-corrections, tool call invocations, tool results — is captured in full regardless of what subset is used for any given downstream purpose. (Authority 7, source: 55a61a95-64fd-475b-a985-7962936fb07e)
6. No governing constraint may be truncated silently. Governing constraints (Authority Level 6+) are always delivered in full via the stdin directive channel. (Authority 7, source: b680da1d-f6d6-4113-ab4d-1a166154aff7)
7. The Governed Stream is single-threaded. No parallel Workflow Runs in a Workspace. (Authority 7, source: 5c77f777-a698-405b-9881-b6813ae04ec5)
8. Agents never exercise judgment. Judgment is always escalated to the human. (Authority 7, source: b3e3ec17-574d-4915-99a2-244e0e71639e)
9. Every human interaction is recorded in the Governed Stream in full detail. (Authority 7, source: d7f5ea89-7265-4416-847f-348290ea28a2)
10. Every Phase Gate requires human approval. No automated gate passage. (Authority 7, source: ba84c364-c2f2-4a63-86ff-f3a49aba6c19)
template_variables.traced_journeys:
- UJ-SUBMIT-NEW-LINK [Phase 1] (persona P-SHARER) User Submits New Short URL Request: P-SHARER pastes a long URL into the input field and submits a request to create a short link.
  Acceptance: Link created successfully within VV-REDIRECT-LATENCY threshold | No plaintext URLs found in storage (VV-SECURITY-ENCRYPTION) | Valid slug returned
template_variables.traced_entities: - ENT-LINK (DOM-URL-SHORTENER) Link Definition: Core entity representing a submitted short link and its target destination.
template_variables.traced_compliance_items: - COMP-PII-SANCTION [CONSTRAINT] Treat all stored URLs as sensitive: encrypt at rest (NFR-2), and accept a deletion request from a sharer who knows the slug.
template_variables.canonical_vocabulary:
- VOC-TINYURL TinyURL: TinyURL is a public-facing service that converts a long URL into a short, shareable URL and redirects requests for the short URL back to the original destination.
- VOC-SHORT-URL Short URL: A short, shareable URL generated by the service.
- VOC-ORIGINAL-URL Original URL: The destination URL stored in the mapping.
- VOC-CLICK-COUNTER Click Counter: A metric that increments per redirect issued.
- VOC-VANITY-SLUGS Vanity Slugs: Custom slugs requested by the user.
- VOC-HEALTH-CHECK-ENDPOINT Health-check Endpoint: An endpoint that exists and is monitored externally.
- VOC-DELETION-REQUEST Deletion Request: A request from a sharer to delete their mapped URL.
- VOC-SLUG slug: A unique 6-character string generated to identify a URL mapping.

parsed_json.action: Submit a long URL to generate a unique 6-char slug via POST endpoint
parsed_json.outcome: System stores encrypted original URL and assigns a unique VOC-SHORT-URL slug for immediate use

acceptance_criteria.description: Short URL generation succeeds for valid input
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: POST /shortener with a valid URL payload returns HTTP 201 and includes a VOC-SHORT-URL field with a 6-character alphanumeric slug, with redirect resolution to the target URL occurring within VV-REDIRECT-LATENCY threshold

acceptance_criteria.description: Original URL is encrypted at rest
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: Stored mapping of VOC-ORIGINAL-URL to VOC-SHORT-URL contains ciphertext values in primary storage, with no plaintext URL found in storage logs or VV-SECURITY-ENCRYPTION verification

acceptance_criteria.description: Invalid or missing input is rejected
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: POST /shortener with missing, empty, or malformed URL field returns HTTP 400 with error code INVALID_URL and no record is persisted

acceptance_criteria.description: Generated slug is unique and persistent
acceptance_criteria.measurable_condition: POST /shortener generates a unique slug for each request, and no collision occurs where two different VOC-ORIGINAL-URLs map to the same VOC-SHORT-URL slug
DELETE /shortener/{slug} using the created VOC-SHORT-URL successfully removes the mapping from storage, confirming COMP-PII-SANCTION deletion obligation support
